); const QRCodeManagement = () => { const codes = [ { name: 'External Audit Team (3)', id: 'QR-00892', validUntil: '25 Mar, 06:00 PM', status: 'active' }, { name: 'Supplier: TechLogistics', id: 'QR-00914', validUntil: '24 Mar, 08:00 PM', status: 'active' }, { name: 'Temporary Maintenance', id: 'QR-00915', validUntil: '24 Mar, 11:59 PM', status: 'active' }, ]; return (

{codes.map((code, i) => ( ))}
); }; export default QRCodeManagement;
